scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:migrate
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm run typecheck:api && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test:api: pnpm run typecheck:libs && node --import tsx --test api/_test/auth.test.ts api/_test/login.test.ts api/_test/logout.test.ts api/_test/marketing-sources.test.ts
scripts.test: pnpm run test:pdf && pnpm run test:email && pnpm run test:api
